path: PNGS/Bibi Aisha said Ali had more knowledge than her.png
text: It was narrated that Shuraih bin Hani' said: *I asked 'Aishah about wiping over the leather socks and she said: *Go to "{Ali and ask him, for he knows more about that than | do." So 1 went to "Alil and asked him about wiping. He said: ‘The Messenger of Allah used to tell us that the resident could wipe for one day and one night, and the traveler could do so for three days. " Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) [ — : Sunan Tbn Majah 552
